title: Invited Talk at Brandeis University
content: Dr. Khadra delivered an invited seminar titled "Intrinsic Dynamics Under Synaptic Bombardment: Mechanisms of Burst Firing and Spiking Heterogeneity In Vivo" at the Department of Mathematics, Brandeis University, USA.

title: Trainee Presentations at Joint SIAM/CAIMS Annual Meeting
content: Lab trainees Nils Koch, Amin Akhshi, and Louis Richez delivered talks on their respective neural excitability and stochastic modeling research at the Third Joint SIAM/CAIMS Annual Meetings in Montreal.

title: Talk at Society for Mathematical Biology (SMB) in Seoul
content: Dr. Khadra delivered a talk titled "Deciphering the Dynamics of Evoked and Spontaneous Calcium Transients in Oligodendrocytes" at the Annual SMB Meeting in Seoul, South Korea.
